message:
refactor: add read_tail utility and remove unused uncertainty types

Efficient Tail Reading (src/utils/fs.rs):
- Add read_tail(path, count) function for reading last N lines
- Uses seek-based approach: reads last 8KB chunk instead of whole file
- Handles edge cases: empty file, file smaller than chunk, partial lines
- Returns Vec<String> with the last 'count' lines
- Add comprehensive tests for various file sizes and edge cases

Context Capture Optimization (src/context/capture.rs):
- Replace inline history file reading with read_tail() call
- Change git diff to use --name-only flag for lighter output
  (full diffs can be very large and aren't needed for context hashing)
- Remove unused MsError import
- Reduces memory usage for large repositories with many changes

Dead Type Removal - Transformation (src/cass/transformation.rs):
- Remove UncertaintyItem struct (unused, duplicated in cass/mining.rs)
- Remove UncertaintyReason enum (unused, learning system not implemented)
- Remove test_uncertainty_reason_serialization test (tested removed type)
- Keep NullUncertaintyQueue and UncertaintyQueueSink trait (still used)

Dead Type Removal - Skill (src/core/skill.rs):
- Remove UncertaintyItem struct (duplicated definition)
- Remove UncertaintyStatus enum (never used)
- Remove ExtractedPattern struct (duplicated in cass/mining.rs)
- The authoritative definitions live in cass/mining.rs where they're used

These types were leftover from early design iterations and created
confusion about which definition was canonical. The cass/mining.rs
versions are the ones actually used by the pattern extraction system.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -456,51 +456,6 @@ pub struct EvidenceCoverage {
     pub avg_confidence: f32,
 }
 
-// =============================================================================
-// UNCERTAINTY QUEUE (LEARNING)
-// =============================================================================
-
-/// Queue item for low-confidence generalizations
-#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
-pub struct UncertaintyItem {
-    /// Unique item ID
-    pub id: String,
-    /// The pattern candidate being evaluated
-    pub pattern_candidate: ExtractedPattern,
-    /// Why this is uncertain
-    pub reason: String,
-    /// Confidence score (0.0 - 1.0)
-    pub confidence: f32,
-    /// Suggested CASS queries to find more evidence
-    pub suggested_queries: Vec<String>,
-    /// Number of auto-mining attempts
-    pub auto_mine_attempts: u32,
-    /// Current status
-    pub status: UncertaintyStatus,
-}
-
-/// Status of an uncertainty item
-#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, Serialize, Deserialize, PartialEq, Eq)]
-#[serde(rename_all = "lowercase")]
-pub enum UncertaintyStatus {
-    Pending,
-    Resolved,
-    Discarded,
-}
-
-/// An extracted pattern from CASS sessions
-#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
-pub struct ExtractedPattern {
-    /// Pattern type (rule, command, example, etc.)
-    pub pattern_type: String,
-    /// The generalized pattern text
-    pub text: String,
-    /// Source sessions
-    pub source_sessions: Vec<String>,
-    /// Confidence score
-    pub confidence: f32,
-}
-

 // SKILL PACK (RUNTIME CACHE)
 // =============================================================================
